info.name: ERP System - Fees Module APIs
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for all Fees module APIs including Fee Categories, Fee Heads, Fee Structures, Student Fee Assignments, Fee Payments, Fee Receipts, Fines, Due Reminders, Installments, and Reports.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000
Authentication: JWT Bearer Token

Permission Requirements:
- ModulePermission("fees") checks: fees.view (GET), fees.add (POST), fees.change (PUT/PATCH), fees.delete (DELETE)
- ModulePermission("reports") checks: reports.view (GET) for report endpoints
- IsSchoolMember ensures user belongs to a school

Steps:
1. Login via POST /api/auth/login/ to get access token
2. Ensure user has a role with fees.* permissions assigned
3. Set the token in collection variables or Authorization header
4. Use the token for all subsequent requests

query.description: Year for monthly report (optional, defaults to current year)
Date for daily report YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to today)
